proof:
induction' n with m ih <;> simp [pow_succ]
case succ => (rfl)

induction h₀
case refl => (rfl)
case step => (rfl)

induction' h₀ with n hn ih <;> simp [Nat.pow_succ, Nat.factorial_succ] at *
case step => (simp_all)

statement: (n : ℕ) : (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1)) = n ^ 2
proof: induction n with | zero => simp | succ n ih => rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]; field_simp; ring
